object.name: InputRichBlockSectionHeading
object.description: A section heading, corresponding to the HTML tags <h1>, <h2>, <h3>, <h4>, <h5>, or <h6>.
object.html_description: A section heading, corresponding to the HTML tags <h1>, <h2>, <h3>, <h4>, <h5>, or <h6>.
object.rst_description: A section heading, corresponding to the HTML tags :code:`<h1>`, :code:`<h2>`, :code:`<h3>`, :code:`<h4>`, :code:`<h5>`, or :code:`<h6>`.

annotations.description: Relative size of the text font; 1-6, 1 is the largest, 6 is the smallest

annotations.rst_description: Relative size of the text font; 1-6, 1 is the largest, 6 is the smallest
annotations.name: size
